title: Easy 1
description: Red to play. Finish the vertical threat.
answer: Play D4 to connect four vertically.

title: Medium 1
description: Red to play. Yellow has a quick counter if you miss the center.
moves: D1 c1 E1 c2 F1 b1 _
answer: Play C3 to block yellow and keep the diagonal threat alive.

title: Hard 1
description: Red to play. Complete the line before yellow's stack matters.
moves: D1 a1 E1 a2 F1 b1 _
answer: Play C1 or G1 to complete four horizontally.

title: Expert 1
description: Red to play. Use the stack to force a diagonal.
moves: D1 c1 F1 b1 E1 g1 F2 d2 F3 f4 D3 C2 c3 _
answer: Play E2, preparing the diagonal while yellow's immediate options are covered.

title: Challenger 1
description: Red to play. Find the forcing move.
moves: D1 d2 C1 e1 E2 c2 B1 f1 C3 b2 F2 e3 _
answer: Play D3 to threaten both D4 and G3 paths.
